text.title: AI Marketing Tools Stack by Function
text.summary: Curated AI marketing tools organized by function with selection criteria: integration fit, automation capability, management overhead, and agent-friendliness. Context: AI search queries are becoming conversational task requests, not keyword lookups.

list.item: Semrush AI Visibility Toolkit: track brand appearance in AI-generated search results.
Similarweb Gen AI Intelligence: competitive AI search share analysis.
Otterly.AI, Profound: monitor brand citation frequency in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude responses.
ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini: general-purpose drafting, research, ideation.
Jasper, Copy.ai: brand-voice-trained content generation with workflow automation.
Blaze.ai: multi-channel distribution from a single content source.
Surfer: real-time content scoring and NLP keyword recommendations.
MarketMuse: topic authority and content gap analysis.
Clearscope: semantic SEO recommendations with readability scoring.
Google Ads (ML bidding): automated bid optimization across campaigns.
Albert AI, Acquisio, Adext: autonomous ad campaign management.
Persado, Phrasee: AI-generated ad copy optimized for emotion and conversion.
n8n (OSS): chain AI content generation steps with human approval gates; self-hosted.
Gumloop: no-code LLM connector for marketing workflow automation.
GPT AgentKit: agentic marketing pipeline construction.

section.title: AI Search Context
section.p: AI search queries are shifting from keyword lookups to conversational task requests. "Plumber near me" becomes "Can you get someone to fix my sink this afternoon?" — AI assistants select providers directly, not just list them. Tools must optimize for task completion and agent selection, not just click-through.

text.reference: Evaluation matrix for assessing AI marketing tools
